evidence_refs.quote: # Agentic Benchmark Autogenerator: Automated Construction of Self-Validating Bugfix Tasks via AST Mutation and Test Filtering

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: The method discovers AST mutation candidates in a passing codebase, retains only mutations that cause the test suite to fail, and emits self-contained task bundles comprising a mutated starter repository (with tests removed), evaluator-only hidden tests, a solver prompt, and a restoring oracle patch.

evidence_refs.quote: # Agentic Benchmark Autogenerator: Automated Construction of Self-Validating Bugfix Tasks via AST Mutation and Test Filtering

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: In a local prototype evaluation on one small synthetic Python/pytest fixture repository, the generator identified 29 mutation candidates, attempted 10, and accepted 5 as valid task bundles (acceptance rate 0.5 among attempted mutations, ~0.17 among all candidates).

claims.claim: Independent validation confirmed that all 5 emitted tasks fail their hidden tests in the buggy state and pass after applying the oracle patch.
